name: create-secret
description: Create a new secret in Infisical

projectId.description: The ID of the project to create the secret in

environmentSlug.description: The slug of the environment to create the secret in

secretName.description: The name of the secret to create

secretPath.description: The path where the secret should be stored. Defaults to '/'

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the secret

environmentSlug.description: The slug of the environment containing the secret

secretName.description: The name of the secret to delete

secretPath.description: The path where the secret is stored. Defaults to '/'

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the secret

environmentSlug.description: The slug of the environment containing the secret

secretName.description: The name of the secret to update

newSecretName.description: Optional new name for the secret

secretValue.description: The new value for the secret

secretPath.description: The path where the secret is stored. Defaults to '/'

name: list-secrets
description: List all secrets in a given Infisical project and environment

projectId.description: The ID of the project to list secrets from

environmentSlug.description: The slug of the environment to list secrets from

secretPath.description: The path to list secrets from. Defaults to '/'

expandSecretReferences.description: Whether to expand secret references in values. Defaults to false

includeImports.description: Whether to include imported secrets. Defaults to false

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the secret

environmentSlug.description: The slug of the environment containing the secret

secretName.description: The name of the secret to retrieve

secretPath.description: The path where the secret is stored. Defaults to '/'

expandSecretReferences.description: Whether to expand secret references in the value. Defaults to false

includeImports.description: Whether to include imported secrets. Defaults to false

name: create-project
description: Create a new project in Infisical

projectName.description: The name of the project to create

type.description: The type of project to create

projectTemplate.description: Optional template to use for the project

kmsKeyId.description: Optional KMS key ID for encryption

name: create-environment
description: Create a new environment in Infisical

projectId.description: The ID of the project to create the environment in

name.description: The display name of the environment

slug.description: The slug identifier for the environment

name: create-folder
description: Create a new folder in Infisical

projectId.description: The ID of the project to create the folder in

environment.description: The environment slug where the folder should be created

path.description: The path where the folder should be created. Defaults to '/'

name: invite-members-to-project
description: Invite members to a project in Infisical

projectId.description: The ID of the project to invite members to

emails.description: Optional list of email addresses to invite

usernames.description: Optional list of usernames to invite

roleSlugs.description: Optional list of role slugs to assign to the invited members

name: list-projects
description: List all projects in Infisical that the machine identity has access to

type.description: Optional filter for project type. Defaults to 'all'
